returns._0: AgentInfo struct containing all agent data

authorizeReporter(address).details: Authorize a contract to report success/failure (only owner)

deauthorizeReporter(address).details: Deauthorize a contract from reporting (only owner)

returns.score: Reputation score as percentage (0-100, scaled by 10000)

isAgentRegistered(address).details: Check if an agent is registered

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

registerAgent(string,string).details: Register an agent (can be called by agent itself or by owner)

params.name: Agent's display name
params.serviceEndpoint: Agent's service endpoint (e.g., HTTPS URL or MCP endpoint)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

reportFailure(address).details: Report a failed operation (only authorized reporters)

reportSuccess(address).details: Report a successful operation (only authorized reporters)

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: ERC-165 interface support Indicates support for this interface

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.
